daily_take.headline: Holmgren's odds collapse 16 points, but the market's overreacting to one injury report.
daily_take.deck: August Holmgren dropped from 29.5% to 13.5% in 24 hours on what looks like noise around a minor issue. Sharp bettors know tennis odds swing hard on pre-match intel, but a 16-point crater usually signals overcommitment by one side of the book. At 13.5%, you're getting a player who was competitive enough to be 3-to-1 odds yesterday. Broady's got to prove he belongs at these odds. This is a fade setup.
